pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 5) requires recording an outbound delivery transaction for gifting shares
Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly states 'gifting of 50 shares'
Calculation verified: setup_task.sh line 28 sets price on 2024-12-15 to 24500 cents = $245.00/share. 50 shares × $245.00 = $12,250.00. Task description confirms '$12,250.00 (based on $245.00/share)'

setup_task.sh line 25 declares <isin>US0378331005</isin>. Independently verified via web search: US0378331005 is the official ISIN for Apple Inc (AAPL) per six-structured-products.com, Fidelity, Morgan Stanley, and ISIN.org
setup_task.sh line 14 creates the portfolio file at this exact path

privileged_info_summary: The task requires recording a DELIVERY_OUTBOUND transaction (outbound delivery of 50 shares of Apple Inc AAPL with ISIN US0378331005) dated 2024-12-15 with a total value of $12,250.00 (based on $245.00 per share). The portfolio file is located at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/gift_transfer_portfolio.xml. All numerical values (share count, price, date, total value) and security identifiers are internally consistent and verified against the task setup scripts and authoritative financial databases.
